info.name: Unified Platform - HR Management API
info.description: Complete API documentation for the Unified Platform HR Management System

item.name: 🔐 Authentication
item.description: Public authentication endpoints - no token required

item.name: 🏢 Organization
item.description: Company structure management - Branches, Departments, Designations

item.name: 👨‍💼 Employees
item.description: Employee management - CRUD and related documents

item.name: 🏖️ Leave Management
item.description: Leave requests, approvals, and balance management

item.name: 💰 Payroll
item.description: Salary processing, allowances, loans, and deductions

item.name: ⏰ Attendance & Timesheets
item.description: Track employee attendance and work hours

item.name: 🏥 Insurance Management
item.description: Complete insurance module with claims, policies, and premiums
